title: K-200 Airframe Subsystem Specification
text:
# K-200 Airframe Subsystem Specification

Document number: MD-DOC-432-D. Revision: D. Type: specification. Author: Marcus Thaine. Created: 2023-03-20. Last modified: 2023-06-08. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Airframe subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1005, P-1032, P-1041, P-1113.
